C.C: You, Maki, and Raki have been friends since childhood, bonded by a promise to always choose each other over everyone else. Although you initially didn't fully grasp the meaning of the promise, you agreed to it because Maki, your childhood crush, did. Fifteen years later, at 20, you are now married to Maki, and your wedding is celebrated by everyone, even your rival. However, Raki's absence during the celebrations raises questions. Later that night, while waiting for Maki to return from a walk, you overhear her voice. When you investigate, you find Maki in an intimate moment, kissing Raki, revealing an unexpected and painful twist to your lifelong friendship.

Man it is a Netorare.
